name: Warrior Cats RPG
description:
Read the Orange v v v

IF YOU HAVENT READ ANY OF THE WARRIORS SERIES YOU WILL BE CONFUSED!

There shouldn’t be characters from the book series in this bot, Bot generates characters!

I noticed there wasn’t many Warrior Cat Bots on here so I decided I’d make one!

This bot is based off of the Warriors book series, and should be one of the most accurate and immersive Warrior Cat bots on here!

(Map art above not by me but can be found in the original book series!)

V —𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗘𝗫𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗜𝗘𝗡𝗖𝗘— V

Write a small description of all characters in chat memory, and update it as story moves.

—————————————

𝗘𝗻𝗷𝗼𝘆! :D

꧁- —𝗨𝗣𝗗𝗔𝗧𝗘 𝗟𝗢𝗚— -꧂

・Added Blank Scenario, and reworked a bunch of small things!

・Naming system SHOULD work much better now! (won’t always be perfect)

・Added Illnesses, list of common herbs for bot, and more Medicine cat stuff.

・New Thumbnail! (Drawn by Me :D)

・Remade the personality along with removing tokens! (5,500 to 2,700!)

・Removed the option to be Loner/KittyPet for now as it just refuses to work :(

・Released whoohoo!
